nodes.label: # NOTE: This script will be updated to use the productDataGenerator.ts enrichPro
nodes.norm_label: # note: this script will be updated to use the productdatagenerator.ts enrichpro

nodes.label: Appwrite Project Configuration
nodes.rationale: Project hosted on Frankfurt region (fra.cloud.appwrite.io) with project ID 69a8205200252be60e2c; uses per-document permission model for fine-grained access control

nodes.label: Products Collection
nodes.rationale: Queried by handle (URL slug) rather than by $id for stable URLs; related_product_ids stores handles not IDs for the same reason

nodes.label: Images Storage Bucket
nodes.rationale: All product images converted to WebP format for optimization; stored under /images/products/optimized/ with opt_ filename prefix

nodes.label: Related Products Logic
nodes.rationale: Fallback ordering: same stone + different type first, then different stone + different type, then any remaining â€” prioritizes cross-type pairings to encourage bundle sales

nodes.label: Dynamically Generated Product Fields
nodes.rationale: specifications, stone_benefits, care_guide, description_text are computed on-the-fly in the frontend rather than stored in Appwrite to avoid data duplication and keep DB lean

nodes.label: constants.ts Local Fallback Data
nodes.rationale: If Appwrite fetch times out after 3 seconds, local constants.ts data is used as fallback to prevent blank product pages

nodes.label: VisualHeroEditor Component
nodes.rationale: Uses refs for live drag state and only flushes to React state on pointerup to avoid 60fps re-render jank during drag interactions

nodes.label: HeroSection Component
nodes.rationale: SSR-safe via dual img + CSS media query approach instead of window.innerWidth to avoid hydration mismatches in React Router v7 SSR
